data.short_description: Modern luxury living in the heart of the city with resort-style amenities and stunning mountain views.
data.full_description: The Residences offers an elevated living experience with thoughtfully designed studio, one-, two-, and three-bedroom apartments. Every home features premium finishes including quartz countertops, stainless steel appliances, luxury vinyl plank flooring, and floor-to-ceiling windows. Residents enjoy resort-style amenities including a rooftop pool and lounge, state-of-the-art fitness center, co-working spaces, pet spa, and 24/7 package lockers. Located steps from restaurants, shopping, parks, and public transit with a Walk Score of 92.

data.short_description: East Coast beach estate living with private beach access and world-class amenities in Southampton.
data.full_description: The Hamptons brings the elegance of coastal estate living to a luxury apartment community. Featuring studio through three-bedroom residences with marble countertops, hardwood floors, gas fireplaces, and chef's kitchens. Residents enjoy private beach access, tennis courts, a heated outdoor pool, concierge service, and a members-only beach club. Set along the dunes of Southampton with easy access to village shops, galleries, and farm-to-table dining.

data.short_description: Coastal contemporary living steps from the Pacific in Newport Beach with rooftop ocean views.
data.full_description: The OC is a brand-new coastal contemporary community on Pacific Coast Highway in Newport Beach. Offering studio and one- and two-bedroom residences with quartz waterfall counters, wide-plank oak floors, floor-to-ceiling sliders, and built-in surfboard racks. Residents enjoy a rooftop terrace with infinity pool, ocean-view gym, surf storage, EV charging, and a beach gear checkout program. Walk to the sand, paddleboard rentals, and Newport's best dining.

data.short_description: British-inspired urban living in Chicago's Lincoln Park with old-world charm and modern luxury.
data.full_description: London Town brings the sophistication of British residential design to Chicago's Lincoln Park neighborhood. Offering studio through three-bedroom flats with herringbone hardwood, Belfast sinks, built-in bookshelves, heated bathroom floors, and bay windows. Residents enjoy a library lounge, rooftop garden, on-site pub (The Crown & Kettle), doorman service, and a cinema room. Steps from the lakefront trail, boutique shopping on Armitage, and some of Chicago's best restaurants.
